body.title: Skills sync: update repo cc_skills from live, create Windows unfolder sync step
body.result: cc_skills/ in repo already matches ~/.claude/skills/ (verified 2026-04-01e). install_igor.ps1 step 11 handles Windows sync.
body.description: Two-part task. (1) Ensure ~/TheIgors/claudecode/cc_skills/ is fully in sync with live skills in ~/.claude/skills/ — diff and copy any that differ. This is the source of truth the Windows unfolder reads from. (2) Update the Windows setup unfolder script (wherever it lives) to include a step that copies cc_skills/* into the correct Windows Claude Code skills path (typically %APPDATA%/Claude/skills/ or equivalent). The unfolder already deploys the repo to Windows — add a skills-sync step so updates flow automatically on next Windows setup. Check claudecode/ for any existing unfolder/setup script first.
